info.name: EventON APIfy API
info.description: Postman collection for the administrator-protected MCP discovery and EventON APIfy REST endpoints, including RSVP delta sync, event date-range filtering, sorting, and exact slug lookup.

variable.value: xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx

request.description: Returns the administrator-authenticated MCP schema manifest.
Returns one administrator-authenticated MCP content-type manifest. Set `contentType` to `ajde_events` or `event_rsvps`.
List EventON events with pagination, search, and status filters.
List EventON events that start today or later in the site timezone.

item.name: List events starting on or after date

request.description: List EventON events whose start date is on or after the supplied local date.

item.name: List events within a date range (sorted)

request.description: List EventON events bounded by start date, sorted by start_at descending. orderby accepts start_at, created, modified, or title; order accepts asc or desc.
Resolve events by one or more exact slugs. Accepts a single slug, a comma-separated list, or repeated slug[]= array parameters.
Search EventON events and only return upcoming results.
Get one EventON event by ID.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Ride to Big Bear",
  "slug": "ride-to-big-bear",
  "description": "Optional HTML content",
  "excerpt": "Ride to Big Bear is a one-day ride in Big Bear Lake on April 1, 2026 from 9:00 to 17:00 PT.",
  "status": "publish",
  "tags": ["bike night", "ducati"],
  "event_type": ["Rides", "Featured"],
  "start_date": "2026-04-01",
  "start_time": "09:00",
  "end_date": "2026-04-01",
  "end_time": "17:00",
  "timezone": {
    "key": "America/Los_Angeles",
    "text": "PT"
  },
  "event_status": "scheduled",
  "attendance_mode": "offline",
  "event_subtitle": "High-altitude ride day",
  "event_excerpt": "Ride to Big Bear is a one-day ride in Big Bear Lake on April 1, 2026 from 9:00 to 17:00 PT.",
  "location": {
    "name": "Big Bear Lake",
    "address": "123 Main St",
    "city": "Big Bear Lake",
    "state": "CA",
    "country": "US",
    "link": "https://maps.google.com/?q=Big+Bear+Lake",
    "link_target": true
  },
  "organizers": [
    {
      "name": "EventON APIfy",
      "email": "events@example.com"
    }
  ],
  "event_color": "#ff0000",
  "learn_more_link": "https://example.com/rides/big-bear",
  "learn_more_link_target": true,
  "flags": {
    "featured": true,
    "generate_gmap": true,
    "open_google_maps_link": true
  },
  "interaction": {
    "mode": "external_link",
    "url": "https://example.com/rides/big-bear/details",
    "new_window": true
  },
  "health": {
    "enabled": true,
    "outdoor": true
  },
  "rsvp": {
    "enabled": true,
    "capacity_enabled": true,
    "capacity_count": 75
  }
}

request.description: Partially update an existing EventON event.
Move an EventON event to the WordPress trash.
List RSVP attendee records without delta filters. Requires the EventON RSVP addon and the RSVP attendee API capability.

List RSVP attendee records using deterministic delta sync. Results are ordered by updated_at ASC, id ASC and filtered by updated_after plus updated_after_id. Do not combine delta sync with rsvp, status, or search filters.
Get the yes-only RSVP totals for an event. Requires the EventON RSVP addon and the RSVP summary API capability.
